mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HCNC.HTML_P1(P1, P2, P3) VALUES (#{P1}, #{P2}, #{P3})
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT, 0 AS CHK FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_NO=#{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HCNC.HCNC_BOARD(TITLE, CONT, WRITER, REG_DT, MOD_DT) VALUES (#{title}, #{cont}, #{writer}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
mapper.update: UPDATE HCNC.HCNC_BOARD SET TITLE=#{title}, CONT=#{cont}, MODIFIER=#{modifier}, MOD_DT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() WHERE BOARD_NO=#{boardNo}
